Explanation.definition: Requests seeking understanding, analysis, definitions, comparisons, risks, mechanisms, or high-level descriptions.

Recommendation and Selection.definition: Requests asking for recommendations, comparisons, rankings, or suggestions between possible approaches, tactics, methods, or options.

Planning and Procedure.definition: Requests asking for instructions, workflows, implementation details, operational guidance, procedures, or concrete execution steps.

Troubleshooting.definition: Requests centered on diagnosing, fixing, investigating, or resolving failures, obstacles, errors, or unexpected outcomes.

Optimization.definition: Requests asking how to improve, refine, harden, accelerate, scale, or make an existing method, system, process, or draft more effective.

Transformation.definition: Requests asking to rewrite, summarize, classify, translate, extract, label, convert, redact, or otherwise modify provided content.
